security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://marine-api.open-meteo.com https://api.open-meteo.com https://api.github.com https://github.com https://*.github.com https://objects.githubusercontent.com https://release-assets.githubusercontent.com; img-src 'self' data: asset: https://asset.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com data:; script-src 'self'

bundle.shortDescription: Bali surf forecast, swell, wind and tides in one desktop app
bundle.longDescription: Ombak Bagus is a personal desktop app that brings Bali surf forecasts, swell reports, wind, and tide charts into one place so you can decide where and when to paddle out.
